items.summary: Extend the backend AccidentReport type to include a violations array that captures detected traffic violations (stop sign violations, U-turn violations, traffic signal violations) with fields for violation type, description, and detected timestamp
Update the ReportDetail component to display the ViolationsDisplay and LiabilityDisplay components showing detected violations and calculated fault percentages
Add liability assessment fields to the backend AccidentReport type to store fault percentage splits between parties (e.g., party1Liability: 70%, party2Liability: 30%)

Implement backend logic to detect stop sign violations by analyzing whether a stop sign was present in detected traffic signs and if the vehicle velocity indicates the driver did not come to a complete stop
Implement backend logic to detect U-turn violations by accepting GPS location data and checking if a U-turn was performed in a prohibited area based on detected 'No U-turn' traffic signs

Implement backend logic to detect traffic signal violations by comparing the witness testimony traffic light color against the AI-detected signal state and flagging discrepancies as potential violations
Create a backend function that calculates liability percentages based on detected violations, assigning higher fault percentage to the party with more serious or multiple violations
Update the AccidentReportForm component to accept optional GPS location coordinates (latitude, longitude) and timestamp for enhanced violation detection
Create a ViolationsDisplay component that shows all detected violations in a list format with violation type, description, and timestamp for each violation
Create a LiabilityDisplay component that visualizes the fault percentage split between parties using a progress bar or pie chart style display showing each party's liability percentage
